calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Conest Validity Of Trust Amendments And Determine Entitlement To Remainder Interest
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Conest Validity Of Trust Amendments And Determine Entitlement To Remainder Interest
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Aug-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stanley Friedman for and with Sylvia Friedman.
Lillian Ng. for Sean Angles (Trustee).

The Court questions whether the issue of standing has changed in light of Ms. Ruiz having passed away. Mr. Friedman stated that his Client is the Trustee of Arelia Ruiz's trust and that there is no estate open at this time. Ms. Ng stated that they are spending a lot of time with courtesy copies not being delivered, that Mr. Friedman provided her with a declaration signed by his Client, that she filed a response and it got rejected because the underlying declaration was not filed, and that it includes things that have nothing to do with this petition. Mr. Friedman stated that he was assured by the e-file service that they had delivered the courtesy copies. The Court asked the Parties how they intend to address the standing issue and the procedural issues. Ms. Ng and Mr. Friedman submit on the pleadings. The amended Petition to Surcharge Trustee, etc. is continued to August 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be deemed under submission on that date. Each party is to provide a proposed order reflecting how they wish the Court to rule in electronic form to the Examiner or the Clerk in a word document version.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Conest Validity Of Trust Amendments And Determine Entitlement To Remainder Interest
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Continued To Jul-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Conest Validity Of Trust Amendments And Determine Entitlement To Remainder Interest
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Continued To Jul-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stanley Friedman for and with Sylvia Friedman (Petitioner).
Lillian Ng for and with Sean Angles (Trustee).

The Court stated that the issue is how the Petitioner still has standing in light of Ms. Ruiz having passed away and no longer is a Beneficiary. Mr. Friedman stated that the Petitioner is still an interested person, that the assets of the trust only earned $68.00 for a seven month period, that the assets were reported to be $175,000.00 and that it comes out to $10.00 a month in interest. The Court stated that this is not the relief sought in the petition. Mr. Friedman stated that Settlor of the trust informed the Petitioner that she had a new trust prepared by an Attorney that the caregiver brought to her, that he tried to get a copy of it, that is it his understanding that it was given to Trustee and that the Trustee destroyed it, and that the Settlor indicated that she was told it was invalid. The Court stated that it does not know how this gives standing to Mr. Friedman's Client. Mr. Friedman stated that if the new trust revokes the prior one, then there is the question of who is entitled to the assets, that he believes they still have standing and that the assets were not properly attended to during the time Ms. Ruiz was still alive. Mr. Friedman asked for time to amend his petition. Ms. Ng stated that she does not see that there is any standing at all. The Court rules that the petitioner has no standing on the existing claims, and that the request for removal of the trustee and the request to find that the trust is invalid are dismissed. The petition is continued to July 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition if the Petitioner can do so in good faith to state a claim for which she still has standing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Conest Validity Of Trust Amendments And Determine Entitlement To Remainder Interest
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Continued To Jun-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stanley Friedman for and with Sylvia Friedman (Petitioner).
Lillian Ng for and with Sean Angles (Trustee).

The Court stated that this matter was transferred from San Mateo, and that it needs courtesy copies of the petition, the objections and the reply. Mr. Friedman stated that he has a copy of the petition and that the parties have not spoken. Ms. Ng stated that she has a copy of the objections. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to June 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it is expecting to have the courtesy copies today. The Parties are to meet and confer as to where things stand and what happens next.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
